name: @wokwi/elements

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written CSS/SVG when introductory electronics explanations need realistic component appearance and state for an LED, seven-segment display, or button -- native implementations easily get pins, package details, and consistency across states wrong. It is not for circuit solving or MCU simulation.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only draw abstract boxes or inconsistent LEDs/seven-segment displays, not credible component packages, pins, and states; Wokwi Elements provides packaged native Web Components that manage appearance without pretending to be a simulator.

data_in.note: The input is a restricted custom-element tag plus its native properties; boot uses createElement + Object.assign and does not write declarative custom tags (iron rule 4). Each optional property's default is noted below.

props?._default: {} -- when omitted, use the element's complete default state
props?.value?: boolean -- LED lit state; default false; wokwi-led only
props?.brightness?: number (0..1) -- LED brightness; default 1; wokwi-led only
props?.values?: number[] -- seven-segment 0/1 array ordered A,B,C,D,E,F,G,DP per digit; default [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0]; wokwi-7segment only
props?.digits?: number -- number of seven-segment digits; default 1; wokwi-7segment only
props?.colon?: boolean -- whether to draw the colon; default false; wokwi-7segment only
props?.colonValue?: boolean -- whether the colon is lit; default false; wokwi-7segment only
props?.offColor?: string -- unlit-segment color; default '#444'; wokwi-7segment only
props?.background?: string -- seven-segment background color; default 'black'; wokwi-7segment only
props?.pins?: 'top' | 'extend' | 'none' -- pin display mode; default 'top'; wokwi-7segment only
props?.pressed?: boolean -- button pressed state; default false; wokwi-pushbutton only

when_to_use: 需要在电子入门讲解中显示 LED、七段管或按钮的真实元件外观与状态时用它,而非手写 CSS/SVG——原生在引脚、封装细节和跨状态一致性上容易画错;非做电路求解或 MCU 仿真。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画抽象方框或不一致的 LED/七段管,做不到可信元件封装、引脚与状态表现;Wokwi Elements 提供已封装的原生 Web Components,专管长相而不冒充仿真器。

data_in.note: 输入是一个受限的 custom-element tag 加对应原生 property;boot 用 createElement + Object.assign,不写声明式自定义标签（铁律 4）。可选 property 的默认值逐项注明。

props?._default: {} —— 不传时完全采用元素默认状态
props?.value?: boolean —— LED 点亮状态,默认 false;仅 wokwi-led
props?.brightness?: number（0..1）—— LED 亮度,默认 1;仅 wokwi-led
props?.values?: number[] —— 七段管每位按 A,B,C,D,E,F,G,DP 排列的 0/1 数组,默认 [0,0,0,0,0,0,0,0];仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.digits?: number —— 七段管位数,默认 1;仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.colon?: boolean —— 是否绘制冒号,默认 false;仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.colonValue?: boolean —— 冒号是否点亮,默认 false;仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.offColor?: string —— 熄灭段颜色,默认 '#444';仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.background?: string —— 七段管底色,默认 'black';仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.pins?: 'top' | 'extend' | 'none' —— 引脚显示方式,默认 'top';仅 wokwi-7segment
props?.pressed?: boolean —— 按钮按下状态,默认 false;仅 wokwi-pushbutton

carriers.widget: supported:必须 JS createElement;每个上游元素自带 Shadow DOM 与样式,可挂入 widget 的 shadow 容器
carriers.codex: supported:ESM import 只负责注册 custom elements,无外部 CSS/uplink

isolation.evidence: LIVE: the rendered <wokwi-led> carries its OWN shadowRoot (childCount 1, styles inside the shadow — led_shadowHasStyle=true) and document.head was unchanged (stayed at example.com's baseline count of 1). Lit uses per-element shadow styling, not document.head injection; nothing appended to document.body. LED/7segment are pure passive display elements (no document/window listeners). Each element is a self-contained custom element that drops straight into a widget shadow container.
